title: Step 1
text: Prevent crowds or unauthorized gatherings from entering the healthcare facility and its associated premises unless official instructions are received.

title: Step 2
text: Investigate and determine the precise reasons behind the gathering and assess whether the situation may escalate.

title: Step 3
text: Ensure deployment of sufficient security personnel to manage the gathering and establish security perimeters when required.

title: Step 4
text: Notify facility leadership and communicate with specialized security authorities through the approved emergency channels.

title: Step 5
text: Do not allow members of the gathering to take photographs or raise banners in the vicinity of the healthcare facility and its related premises.

title: Step 6
text: Maintain continuous coordination and communication with the specialized security authorities during the entire incident.

title: Step 7
text: Count the number of individuals involved, classify them according to the security situation, and submit the information to the security administration.

title: Step 8
text: Assign an adequate number of security personnel to accompany persons who may be allowed entry for the purpose of meeting responsible officials inside the facility.

title: Step 9
text: Do not use force except in very limited cases explicitly permitted by law and applicable regulations.

title: Step 10
text: Continue monitoring the situation until it ends completely and ensure that the crowd disperses from the surrounding area of the healthcare facility.

title: Step 11
text: Prepare a joint report with the specialized security authorities and submit it to facility leadership after the incident is concluded.

title: Behavior and Communication
text: During interaction with crowd situations, security personnel should demonstrate patience and calmness, show good conduct, avoid provocative verbal or physical expressions, and avoid creating fear by referencing previous incidents.
